name: ap-invoice-review
description: Self-serve MCPB for deterministic AP invoice exception review.
long_description: Review AP invoice packets with deterministic vendor master matching, PO matching, GRN matching, duplicate checks, tax checks, audit artifacts, and draft-only ERP/SaaS payload generation.

tools.name: create_ap_review_case
tools.description: Create an AP invoice review case and return required upload slots.

tools.name: upload_ap_document
tools.description: Attach a bundled demo invoice, purchase order, or goods receipt PDF to a case.

tools.name: start_ap_invoice_review
tools.description: Run deterministic AP 3-way match, duplicate, vendor, and tax checks.

tools.name: get_ap_invoice_review_result
tools.description: Return a completed AP review decision packet with evidence and artifacts.

tools.name: build_erp_draft_payload
tools.description: Build a draft-only ERP/SaaS payload. External writes are never performed.
